contactSubmission.title: Contact Form Submission
contactSubmission.description: Represents a single submission from the contact form.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the form.

email.description: The email address of the person.

phone.description: The optional phone number of the person.

requirements.description: The project requirements or message from the person.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the form was submitted.

/contacts/{contactId}.description: Stores all the contact form submissions from the website.
